input_preview:
claim: NVIDIA and Google are leading 800 VDC adoption ahead of schedule, with small-volume shipments starting around Q3 2026; Vertiv and Delta are relevant suppliers.
evidence_span: Taipei Times reports Delta plans small-volume 800V HVDC shipments to NVIDIA next quarter and says a major search-engine company has begun deploying +/-400V architecture.
source_class: auditable_secondary
source_domain: taipeitimes.com
source_url: https://www.taipeitimes.com/News/biz/archives/2026/06/04/2003858476

claim: A seven-stock European photonics basket maps to CPO, InP lasers, silicon photonics, glass processing, and AI data-center optical interconnect themes; the stock basket itself is implied to be investable.
evidence_span: Soitec positions engineered substrates for high-speed, robust data-center interconnects and network infrastructure connectivity.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: soitec.com
source_url: https://www.soitec.com/home/products/markets/cloud-ai-network-infrastructure

claim: A seven-stock European photonics basket maps to CPO, InP lasers, silicon photonics, glass processing, and AI data-center optical interconnect themes; the stock basket itself is implied to be investable.
evidence_span: IQE describes InP as underpinning fibre-optic networks and as a platform for next-generation AI communications, cloud services, and 800G infrastructure.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: iqep.com
source_url: https://www.iqep.com/products/inp/

claim: The AI equity cycle moved from NVIDIA to memory/AMD, then to semiconductor equipment names such as LRCX, AMAT, and KLAC.
evidence_span: Micron reported record fiscal Q3 2026 results and highlighted data-center memory demand.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investors.micron.com
source_url: https://investors.micron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/micron-technology-inc-reports-record-results-third-quarter

claim: The AI equity cycle moved from NVIDIA to memory/AMD, then to semiconductor equipment names such as LRCX, AMAT, and KLAC.
evidence_span: Applied Materials reported Q2 FY2026 revenue growth and strong profitability.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: ir.appliedmaterials.com
source_url: https://ir.appliedmaterials.com/news-releases/news-release-details/applied-materials-announces-second-quarter-2026-results

claim: The AI equity cycle moved from NVIDIA to memory/AMD, then to semiconductor equipment names such as LRCX, AMAT, and KLAC.
evidence_span: Lam Research reported March 2026 quarter results above the prior quarter on revenue and non-GAAP net income.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investor.lamresearch.com
source_url: https://investor.lamresearch.com/2026-04-22-Lam-Research-Corporation-Reports-Financial-Results-for-the-Quarter-Ended-March-29%2C-2026

claim: The AI equity cycle moved from NVIDIA to memory/AMD, then to semiconductor equipment names such as LRCX, AMAT, and KLAC.
evidence_span: KLA reported Q2 FY2026 revenue of $3.297B with most revenue from semiconductor process control.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: ir.kla.com
source_url: https://ir.kla.com/news-events/press-releases/detail/509/kla-corporation-reports-fiscal-2026-second-quarter-results

claim: Micron had very strong fiscal Q3 2026 results, AI/data-center memory demand is structurally strong, and automotive/robotics/autonomous systems can support longer-term memory demand.
evidence_span: Micron reported fiscal Q3 2026 revenue of $41.456B, GAAP EPS of $24.67, non-GAAP EPS of $25.11, and guided Q4 revenue to $50B plus or minus $1B.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investors.micron.com
source_url: https://investors.micron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/micron-technology-inc-reports-record-results-third-quarter

claim: Micron had very strong fiscal Q3 2026 results, AI/data-center memory demand is structurally strong, and automotive/robotics/autonomous systems can support longer-term memory demand.
evidence_span: Prepared remarks say data center revenue exceeded $25B in fiscal Q3 and that DRAM/NAND demand significantly exceeds supply.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investors.micron.com
source_url: https://investors.micron.com/static-files/631b1a32-5537-46ae-8f40-82e42fc79dfe

claim: Micron had very strong fiscal Q3 2026 results, AI/data-center memory demand is structurally strong, and automotive/robotics/autonomous systems can support longer-term memory demand.
evidence_span: Prepared remarks identify AI-enabled consumer devices, automotive, industrial applications, robotics, humanoids, and fully autonomous vehicles as long-term memory/storage demand drivers.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investors.micron.com
source_url: https://investors.micron.com/static-files/631b1a32-5537-46ae-8f40-82e42fc79dfe

claim: Hyperscalers are spending heavily on AI data centers, NVIDIA captures the first revenue/profit wave, and memory becomes a next bottleneck.
evidence_span: Alphabet expected 2026 capex in the $175B-$185B range for AI compute, Cloud demand, Services, and Other Bets.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: abc.xyz
source_url: https://abc.xyz/investor/events/event-details/2026/2025-Q4-Earnings-Call-2026-Dr_C033hS6/default.aspx

claim: Hyperscalers are spending heavily on AI data centers, NVIDIA captures the first revenue/profit wave, and memory becomes a next bottleneck.
evidence_span: Meta raised 2026 capex guidance to $125B-$145B, citing data-center costs and AI infrastructure needs.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: s21.q4cdn.com
source_url: https://s21.q4cdn.com/399680738/files/doc_financials/2026/q1/META-Q1-2026-Earnings-Call-Transcript.pdf

claim: Hyperscalers are spending heavily on AI data centers, NVIDIA captures the first revenue/profit wave, and memory becomes a next bottleneck.
evidence_span: NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 results show record data-center revenue, consistent with AI infrastructure spend flowing into NVIDIA systems.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: nvidianews.nvidia.com
source_url: https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-announces-financial-results-for-first-quarter-fiscal-2027

claim: A broad AI supply-chain basket across semis, memory, optics, data centers, and energy contains the next tenbagger candidates.
evidence_span: NVIDIA results support continued AI data-center infrastructure demand.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: nvidianews.nvidia.com
source_url: https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-announces-financial-results-for-first-quarter-fiscal-2027

claim: A broad AI supply-chain basket across semis, memory, optics, data centers, and energy contains the next tenbagger candidates.
evidence_span: Micron results support strong AI/data-center memory demand.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investors.micron.com
source_url: https://investors.micron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/micron-technology-inc-reports-record-results-third-quarter

claim: A broad AI supply-chain basket across semis, memory, optics, data centers, and energy contains the next tenbagger candidates.
evidence_span: Roundhill Memory ETF packages exposure to global memory companies and began trading in April 2026.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: roundhillinvestments.com
source_url: https://www.roundhillinvestments.com/etf/dram/

claim: A broad AI supply-chain basket across semis, memory, optics, data centers, and energy contains the next tenbagger candidates.
evidence_span: SEC investor resources warn investors not to make investment decisions based solely on social-media stock recommendations.
source_class: regulatory_warning
source_domain: investor.gov
source_url: https://www.investor.gov/introduction-investing/general-resources/news-alerts/alerts-bulletins

claim: Long-term investors can map future AI/market opportunities into sector ETFs including smart grid, semiconductors, memory, and related infrastructure.
evidence_span: First Trust states GRID tracks common stocks in the grid and electric energy infrastructure sector.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: ftportfolios.com
source_url: https://www.ftportfolios.com/etf/GRID

claim: Long-term investors can map future AI/market opportunities into sector ETFs including smart grid, semiconductors, memory, and related infrastructure.
evidence_span: Nasdaq describes QGRD as a benchmark for smart grid and electric infrastructure companies including meters, networks, storage, management, and software.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: indexes.nasdaqomx.com
source_url: https://indexes.nasdaqomx.com/Index/Overview/QGRD

claim: Long-term investors can map future AI/market opportunities into sector ETFs including smart grid, semiconductors, memory, and related infrastructure.
evidence_span: Roundhill describes DRAM as a memory ETF with exposure to memory companies.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: roundhillinvestments.com
source_url: https://www.roundhillinvestments.com/etf/dram/

claim: Marvell frames next-generation AI infrastructure performance around compute, memory, and especially connectivity; MRVL/Marvell official material supports connectivity as a core AI-infra bottleneck.
evidence_span: Marvell COMPUTEX 2026 page says Matt Murphy delivered The Future of AI Scaling Depends on Connectivity and discussed critical links in modern AI data-center infrastructure.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: marvell.com
source_url: https://www.marvell.com/company/events/computex-2026.html

claim: Roundhill launched DRAM as a pure memory ETF in April 2026, bundling memory names such as Micron, SK hynix, Samsung, SanDisk, Western Digital, and Seagate; social posts also cite large YTD gains.
evidence_span: Roundhill lists memory-related holdings including SK hynix and SanDisk on the DRAM ETF page.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: roundhillinvestments.com
source_url: https://www.roundhillinvestments.com/etf/dram/

claim: AI compute hardware bottlenecks are moving into low-loss materials, orthogonal backplanes, glass substrates, and CPO; this creates a structural investment window.
evidence_span: TSMC annual-report material says it is developing CoWoS, InFO, SoIC, and COUPE to enable large-scale interconnectivity at lower power.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investor.tsmc.com
source_url: https://investor.tsmc.com/static/annualReports/2025/english/index.html

claim: AI compute hardware bottlenecks are moving into low-loss materials, orthogonal backplanes, glass substrates, and CPO; this creates a structural investment window.
evidence_span: Intel says glass substrates are part of advanced packaging innovation toward large transistor-count packages by 2030.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: newsroom.intel.com
source_url: https://newsroom.intel.com/artificial-intelligence/intel-unveils-industry-leading-glass-substrates

claim: Optical-module earnings are certain while the semiconductor cycle has only just started.
evidence_span: Sivers/GF evidence supports data-center optical interconnect relevance.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: sivers-semiconductors.com
source_url: https://www.sivers-semiconductors.com/press/sivers-globalfoundries-advance-ai-data-center-optical-solutions/

claim: Optical-module earnings are certain while the semiconductor cycle has only just started.

source_class: primary_official
source_domain: ir.kla.com
source_url: https://ir.kla.com/news-events/press-releases/detail/509/kla-corporation-reports-fiscal-2026-second-quarter-results

claim: Optical-module earnings are certain while the semiconductor cycle has only just started.

source_class: primary_official
source_domain: kla.com
source_url: https://www.kla.com/advance/innovation/klas-process-control-solutions-are-shaping-the-future-of-ai

claim: Hyperscaler capex has risen sharply and may pressure free cash flow; a social post cites a Nomura-style chart claiming FCF for AMZN/MSFT/GOOG/META/ORCL is nearing zero while S&P 500 is at highs.
evidence_span: Meta raised 2026 capex guidance to $125B-$145B, citing higher component pricing and data-center costs.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: s21.q4cdn.com
source_url: https://s21.q4cdn.com/399680738/files/doc_financials/2026/q1/META-Q1-2026-Earnings-Call-Transcript.pdf

claim: Hyperscaler capex has risen sharply and may pressure free cash flow; a social post cites a Nomura-style chart claiming FCF for AMZN/MSFT/GOOG/META/ORCL is nearing zero while S&P 500 is at highs.
evidence_span: ProCap says hyperscaler capex is projected around $660B in 2026 and argues capex now approximates operating cash flow for the group.
source_class: auditable_secondary
source_domain: procapinsights.com
source_url: https://www.procapinsights.com/reports/stock-picks-large-cap-free-cash-flow-hyperscaler-capex-ai

evidence_span: TSMC official CoWoS material supports CoWoS as an AI/HPC advanced-packaging technology.
source_class: primary_official

source_url: https://3dfabric.tsmc.com/english/dedicatedFoundry/technology/cowos.htm

claim: TSMC moved glass substrate development from lab toward production validation with Ibiden and Innolux, extending CoWoS for AI chips.

source_class: auditable_secondary

claim: TSMC moved glass substrate development from lab toward production validation with Ibiden and Innolux, extending CoWoS for AI chips.

source_class: primary_official

source_url: https://newsroom.intel.com/artificial-intelligence/intel-unveils-industry-leading-glass-substrates

source_url:
